segment.source: Renders an intro (eyebrow, heading, subheadline) above a responsive grid of equal-sized cards, each with a title and rich-text description, without icons or images. Use it for: text-only lists of services, benefits, capabilities, or USPs where every point carries the same weight. Prefer '3-Column Feature Grid' or 'Icon Feature Grid' when each point has an icon; use 'List Feature Section' for a vertical rundown.
